event.title: AGN on the Beach II
event.subtitle: A multi-scale view of jetted AGN

hero.heading: Detailed Programme
hero.lead: Session-by-session planning for “A multi-scale view of jetted AGN”.
hero.description: Track how the week integrates observers, theorists, and modelers to build a shared roadmap for the jet community.

intro.title: Programme Philosophy
paragraphs: The Scientific Organising Committee is curating a hands-on agenda balancing invited keynotes, contributed science talks, collaborative breakouts, and informal time on the beach.
Each day flows from jet launching physics to feedback on host galaxies, ensuring observations and simulations inform a shared set of priorities.
intro.sidebar_note: Exact timings remain indicative and may shift slightly as speakers confirm.

quicknav.title: Navigate by day
quicknav.note: Use the chips to jump directly to the schedule for each workshop day.

schedule.title: Draft daily structure
schedule.note: Invited speakers, session chairs, and logistics will be released after abstract selections in May–June 2026.

items.title: Participant briefing pack
items.description: Travel logistics, accommodation blocks, and the code of conduct will be shared alongside the second announcement.

items.title: Session templates
items.description: Slide and poster templates will be available for download ahead of the abstract deadline.

items.title: Working group notes
items.description: Collaborative documents will capture outcomes for each focus track and will be circulated after the workshop.

invited.title: Invited Speakers
invited.lead: The Scientific Organising Committee is finalising the invited line-up for the January 2026 circular.

people.name: To be announced
people.detail: Full invited speaker roster released with the second announcement.

people.name: Community contributions
people.detail: Contributed talks and posters will be selected from abstracts submitted January–April 2026.

invited.footnote: Watch for updates as session chairs confirm participation.

loc.title: Local Organising Committee
loc.lead: The LOC will coordinate on-the-ground logistics, venue liaising, and participant support in Diani.
loc.footnote: A full LOC roster will follow in the second announcement.

sessions.title: Welcome & framing from the SOC
sessions.description: Kick off the week with expectations, working norms, and updates from the Scientific Organising Committee.

sessions.title: Keynote: Launching relativistic jets in low-luminosity systems
sessions.description: Explore the accretion physics and magnetised environments that trigger compact jet episodes in nearby galaxies.

sessions.title: Observational snapshots across radio/mm facilities
sessions.description: Share recent results from VLBI, ALMA, and MeerKAT campaigns linking parsec-scale structures to host environments.

sessions.title: Breakout discussions: Jet launching puzzles
sessions.description: Small groups align on priority questions spanning jet duty cycles, composition, and observable diagnostics.

sessions.title: Beach reception & poster icebreaker
sessions.description: Connect with participants over posters and lightning introductions as the sun sets over Diani.

sessions.title: Plenary: Understanding compact and kiloparsec morphologies
sessions.description: Compare jet morphologies across environments to diagnose how hosts, fueling, and magnetic fields shape observed structure.

sessions.title: Parallel clinics: Environmental influences
sessions.description: Teams tackle how host conditions, gas supply, and feedback signatures shift as jets propagate beyond the nucleus.

sessions.title: Working session: Linking morphology to host galaxies
sessions.description: Coalesce observational diagnostics with simulation outputs to identify discriminants for future surveys.

sessions.title: Poster session: Early-career spotlights
sessions.description: Feature early-career researchers presenting new results on compact jets and AGN feedback.

sessions.title: Unstructured collaboration hours
sessions.description: Evening slots reserved for ad-hoc collaborations, code walk-throughs, or bilateral project planning.

sessions.title: Simulation clinics: Hydrodynamical modelling
sessions.description: Hands-on demonstrations covering grid, particle, and hybrid approaches to modelling jet-ISM interactions.

sessions.title: Hands-on breakouts: Code comparison sprints
sessions.description: Compare methodologies, share benchmarks, and identify where simulations diverge from observational constraints.

sessions.title: Panel: Bridging theory and observation
sessions.description: Observers and simulators outline the dataset requirements and metrics needed to keep theory and data aligned.

sessions.title: Beachside networking dinner
sessions.description: Share progress and unwind with an informal dinner overlooking the ocean.

sessions.title: Plenary: Feedback signatures in host galaxies
sessions.description: Assess how compact jets couple with the interstellar medium and regulate star formation across different environments.

sessions.title: Working groups: Coordinated observing campaigns
sessions.description: Draft proposals for multi-wavelength campaigns, aligning facilities, timelines, and data sharing principles.

sessions.title: Roundtable: Community data sharing frameworks
sessions.description: Define priorities for open data, archival coordination, and shared analysis tools across the AGN jet community.

sessions.title: Sunset walk & informal meetups
sessions.description: Encourage cross-team networking with an informal stroll along the beach.

sessions.title: Synthesis reports from working groups
sessions.description: Working groups recap progress, open questions, and proposed collaborative outputs.

sessions.title: Roadmap drafting for 2026–2030
sessions.description: Define shared milestones for coordinated observations, simulation benchmarks, and community infrastructure.

sessions.title: Closing remarks & next actions
sessions.description: Summarise workshop outcomes, confirm deliverables, and outline communication pathways post-event.

sessions.title: Optional excursions & departures
sessions.description: Wind down with informal excursions or depart via shuttles to Ukunda and Nairobi.
